business_problem: Octopus Energy operates across eight countries and multiple business lines while running a virtual power plant fed by billions of smart-meter signals. Unifying that data and giving thousands of users safe, governed access — without slowing the build-out of generative AI capabilities — was essential to optimizing when to charge and discharge 1.8 gigawatts of flexible load.
solution_summary: Octopus Energy unifies data from eight countries and multiple business lines on the Databricks Data Intelligence Platform, with billions of smart-meter signals feeding the virtual power plant that optimizes when to charge and discharge 1.8 gigawatts of flexible load for cheaper, greener power. Unity Catalog keeps thousands of internal users working safely on shared data across the unified platform, and Agent Bricks is being rolled out so employees can build governed AI agents on the same foundation — keeping Octopus at the forefront of clean-energy innovation while maintaining data trust at scale.
business_outcome: Octopus Energy can optimize 1.8 gigawatts of flexible load for cheaper, greener power by harnessing billions of smart-meter signals on a unified, Unity Catalog–governed platform that scales safely to thousands of users across eight countries — with Agent Bricks set to extend governed AI directly into employees' hands.
metrics: Billions of smart meter signals processed
Thousands of users on the platform
architecture_clues: Databricks Data Intelligence Platform as the unified data foundation
Unity Catalog governance for thousands of shared-data users
Agent Bricks planned for governed employee-built AI agents

With billions of smart meter signals feeding its virtual power plant, teams can optimize when to charge and discharge 1.8 gigawatts of flexible load
Unity Catalog keeps thousands of users working safely on shared data

The platform powers virtual-power-plant decisions that optimize when to charge and discharge 1.8 GW of flexible load. Agent Bricks is being rolled out so employees can build governed AI agents on the same foundation.
